movie.actors: Tom Atkins, Stacey Nelkin, Dan O'Herlihy, Michael Currie
movie.plot: An apparent murder-suicide in a hospital emergency room leads to an investigation by the on-call doctor, which reveals a plot by an insane toymaker to kill as many people as possible during Halloween through an ancient Celtic ritual involving a stolen boulder from Stonehenge and Halloween masks.
movie.title: Halloween III: Season of the Witch
